studyName: Transplant Outcomes in Aplastic Anemia (TOAA): GWAS Data

tables.description: Subject ID, affection status, array imputed ancestry, and ASA, CEU, and YRI array result of participants with aplastic anemia and involved in the "Transplant Outcomes in Aplastic Anemia (TOAA): GWAS and WES Data" project.

variables.name: Array.ASA
variables.description: Imputed ancestry score of ASA using array genotyping data

variables.name: Array.CEU
variables.description: Imputed ancestry score of CEU using array genotyping data

variables.name: Array.Imputed_Ancestry
variables.description: Imputed ancestry using array genotyping data. 0.8 was used as the threshold for imputed ancestry designation. Subjects were assigned to just one ancestry group if the ancestry score fell above this threshold for just one group. ADMIXED populations were designated as ancestry groups with an imputed ancestry score greater than 0.2 and less than 0.8. These are named as ADMIXED plus the name of ancestry group if only one group met these criteria.

variables.name: Array.YRI
variables.description: Imputed ancestry score of YRI using array genotyping data

tables.description: Sample ID, analyte type of sample, body site of sample, histological type of sample, and tumor status of participants with aplastic anemia and involved in the "Transplant Outcomes in Aplastic Anemia (TOAA): GWAS and WES Data" project.

variables.name: BODY_SITE
variables.description: Body site where sample was collected
